news.title: Passionfroot raises $15M to expand its B2B creator marketplace to the US
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Passionfroot, a German startup building a marketplace connecting B2B creators with brands, has raised $15M in a Series A round led by Insight Partners.

news.title: Glow emerges from stealth at $1.2B valuation to challenge endpoint security in the AI era
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Glow is targeting a new class of endpoint risks created by the rapid adoption of AI agents and developer tools inside enterprises.

news.title: Synthesia’s AI training platform is moving beyond videos into live coaching
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Synthesia launched AI Roleplay Sessions, an interactive enterprise training platform where employees practice workplace conversations with AI avatars that provide feedback, scoring, and analytics to help companies measure training effectiveness.

news.title: Heat, hardware and high stakes at China’s biggest World Artificial Intelligence Conference
news.description: [SOUTH CHINA MORNING POST] SCMP’s Ann Cao just finished covering her sixth WAIC in Shanghai, and now she’s eagerly looking forward to the next one.

news.title: Human experts remain essential for checking clinical AI outputs

news.title: Applied Intuition Launches Dana, the Agentic Platform for Physical AI
news.description: [THE MANILA TIMES] New platform pairs agentic AI with the tooling, data, infrastructure and domain expertise Applied Intuition has built over nearly a decade to speed the safe development of intelligent machines for the physical world.

news.title: Sony and Mitsubishi Set Up AI Vision Joint Venture for Factories
news.description: [BLOOMBERG] Mitsubishi Electric Corp. and Sony Group Corp. said they will set up a joint venture to provide factory automation services by combining their expertise in artificial intelligence and image sensors.

news.title: A once wary Hollywood slowly warms to AI
news.description: [BANGKOK POST] NEW YORK — Once wary of artificial intelligence (AI), Hollywood is now striking up partnerships with AI start-ups and weaving the technology into productions more and more openly, all while insisting the creative process itself will remain untouched.

news.title: US stock market to Kospi: Here’s world equity heatmap you should know before opening of the Indian stock market today
news.description: [LIVEMINT] Global markets witnessed a strong recovery as investors shifted their focus back toward artificial intelligence (AI) and technology stocks ahead of key earnings from Alphabet and Tesla.

news.title: China’s ‘AI for All’ Push Defies US Containment Playbook
news.description: [BLOOMBERG] The rapidly increasing global competitiveness of China’s artificial intelligence models is ringing alarm bells in Washington, posing a new test for the standard protectionist playbook.

news.title: Elon Musk Says He’d Put up $100 Million for Mel Gibson to Make an ‘Historically Accurate’ ‘The Odyssey’ Movie
news.description: [BREITBART NEWS NETWORK] Elon Musk has promised to task Mel Gibson with harnessing artificial intelligence to create his own version of 'The Odyssey' after becoming a vocal critic of Christopher Nolan’s adaptation.
